title: ribes divaricatum var. klamathense
intro: Ribes divaricatum var. klamathense, also known as Klamath gooseberry or Klamath currant, is a variety of the shrub Ribes divaricatum, native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ribes divaricatum var. klamathense include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
